creator: bhughes@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 181262
net/turnserver: Update to 4.5.0.6

Update to the latest upstream coturn release. This release includes a
fix for TLS1.2 and BoringSSL compatibility.

portlint: OK (-C, warning about adding NLS knob)
testport: OK (poudriere, 11.0-R, 10.3-R, amd64/i386, default options)
